sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M':
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"Magenta at: {b}")
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] < 20:
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"Dark gray square boundary: {b}")
        print(f"  children: {n['children']}")
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        r, c = b[0]
        if r > 55:
            print(f"Purple pixel near target: ({r},{c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
